metadata.description: Daily-use Claude Code plugins: own and curated community.

plugins.name: library-skills
plugins.description: Pulls in up-to-date official skills shipped by a project's installed libraries (FastAPI, Streamlit, etc.) via tiangolo/library-skills.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Strips AI-tell patterns from text (em-dash overuse, inflated symbolism, rule of three, vague attributions, AI vocabulary, etc.) based on Wikipedia's 'Signs of AI writing' guide.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Pull-request review doctrine (triage, lenses, severity, stop rules) plus agent-specific tactics (context budget, tool escalation, review fan-out, responsible non-review).

plugins.name: apple-dev
plugins.description: Modern SwiftUI doctrine plus 7 recipes for Apple-platform development: no-ViewModel patterns, modular SwiftPM, Foundation Models on-device LLM, AppRouter navigation, iOS 26 Liquid Glass, encrypted push proxy, XcodeBuildMCP build verification, ObservableObject-to-Observable refactor.

plugins.name: project-report
plugins.description: Generate a high-level weekly status report for a Basecamp project. Activity-first via the basecamp CLI; outputs a lean 3-section markdown report (TL;DR, blockers, gaps).

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: Full ElevenLabs coverage for building with the API: the 9 official ElevenLabs agent skills (vendored, re-syncable) plus gap skills that pull live docs indexes for voices, dubbing, dialogue, studio, admin, SDKs, image-video, Reception AI, and a docs-lookup catch-all.

plugins.name: tools
plugins.description: Daily agent tools: artifact creation, advisor review, browser automation, TUI automation, subagent orchestration, and Codex model routing.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Daily-driver development bundle: deep-module design and architecture-improvement scans (two skills by Matt Pocock, vendored), plus pr-review and tools pulled in as dependencies.

plugins.name: writing-great-skills
plugins.description: Reference vocabulary and principles for writing and editing Claude Code skills well. Skill by Matt Pocock, vendored.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design-focused frontend bundle: shadcn/ui composition plus Impeccable design craft, audit, polish, and anti-pattern detection.

plugins.name: database
plugins.description: Database skills focused on Postgres performance, schema design, indexes, RLS, and query optimization.

plugins.name: agent-debugger
plugins.description: Pause execution and inspect runtime state via DAP. Attach to live processes by PID, no restart or code changes required.

plugins.name: skill-doctor
plugins.description: Evaluate Claude Code skills against best practices. Tracks skill usage globally via hooks.

plugins.name: agent-debate
plugins.description: Spawn a peer back-and-forth between Claude (max thinking) and Codex (high reasoning) on hard architecture decisions.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, brainstorming, plan-writing, code-review patterns.

plugins.name: qdrant
plugins.description: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search: scaling, performance, search quality, monitoring, deployment, SDK usage.

plugins.name: basecamp
plugins.description: Basecamp integration for Claude Code: create todos, track work, link code to projects.

plugins.name: langchain-skills
plugins.description: Agent skills for building agents with LangChain, LangGraph, and Deep Agents.

plugins.name: fable-delegation-to-codex
plugins.description: Routes all delegable work (exploration, bulk reads, tests, mechanical edits, first-pass reviews, sweeps) from a Fable session to the Codex CLI via codex exec, spending Codex quota instead of Anthropic tokens.
